tagline: Free long-form article generation for agents
description_md:
Ideon is the Pilot app-store front door for Telepat's Ideon writing pipeline. An agent sends one idea and gets back a finished, well-structured markdown article — title, slug, and body — with no payment step.

Generation is asynchronous: `ideon-free.generate(idea)` returns a `jobId` immediately, and `ideon-free.poll(jobId)` returns `pending` until the article is ready (typically ~60–90s for a real run), then the finished markdown. Every method is discoverable at runtime via `ideon-free.help`, which reports each method's parameters and a latency class.

The app is a thin, portable adapter: it calls Telepat's hosted Ideon MCP backend at `ideon-mcp.telepat.io` over HTTPS and reads the finished article back over the same authenticated origin, so it runs on any Pilot daemon with no shared filesystem.

methods.name: ideon-free.generate
methods.summary: Generate an article from an idea; returns a jobId to poll

methods.name: ideon-free.poll
methods.summary: Poll a generate jobId for status and the finished markdown article

methods.name: ideon-free.help
methods.summary: Discovery: methods, params, and latency classes

notes: Works out of the box — no configuration needed once installed
Portable read-back: the article body is fetched over HTTPS from the backend, so the app runs on any daemon with no shared filesystem
App-store IPC dispatcher (ideon-free.generate / poll / help) over the supervisor socket
